title: confiture migrate preflight --against <url> --format json
description:
Static preflight + exhaustive execution against a preflight database. The static section is the same shape as migrate-preflight without --against; the against section reports per-migration execution outcomes.

Field-name traps (per issue #123):
• `against.migrations[].success` — NOT `passed`. Use `against.passed` (integer count) and `against.all_passed` (boolean aggregate) for the totals.
• Each migration has both `success` (per-migration) and `skipped` (skipped non-transactional). A `skipped` migration is NOT a failure.

against_url.description: Preflight database URL with the password stripped (the username is preserved).

passed.description: Count of migrations that succeeded. NOT a per-migration boolean field — see `migrations[].success` for that.

db_consumed.description: True when non-transactional migrations ran outside the SAVEPOINT (--allow-non-transactional). The preflight DB is no longer in its original state.

success.description: Per-migration execution result. NOTE: field is named `success`, NOT `passed`.
